Description.value: Quest progression tuning bundle. (1) POI Scourge Beacon: tier-aware quest derivative (quest_scourge_infestation_t1..t6) with scourge tokens grant on completion. (2) Quest Revamp super/ultra/nightmare: counter +alpha boost on completion (super +1, ultra/nightmare +2) without altering difficulty_tier (preserves trader-tier gating). Requires HarmonyX (0_TFP_Harmony) and POI Scourge. EAC must be off.
